description_long: This is a medium-sized, round wooden bucket with a slightly tapered cylindrical shape, wider at the top and narrowing towards the base. The exterior is constructed from vertical wooden staves, held together by two prominent black metal bands encircling the upper and lower portions of the bucket. The wood grain is visible, giving it a rustic and natural appearance, while the metal bands provide structural reinforcement. Two rectangular, integrated wooden handles are attached to the rim on opposite sides, allowing for easy lifting and carrying. The interior is open and hollow, suitable for holding liquids or other materials, and the bucket lacks any visible lid or cover.
description: A rustic wooden bucket with black metal bands and two rectangular wooden handles, featuring a visible wood grain and open top.
description_view_0: The bucket is seen from the front, showing both rectangular handles and the full curvature of the upper rim.
description_view_1: This view highlights the left handle more prominently and reveals the bucket's interior depth.
description_view_2: The bucket is rotated to show the right handle more clearly, with the metal bands and wood grain in focus.
description_view_3: The right handle is most visible, and the bucket's round shape and banding are emphasized.
